Description.Name: Unexpected Rewards
Description.Details: The Argo is still preparing for travel when a proximity alert chirps on the bridge console. An unmarked shuttle, running cold with no transponder, slides into docking range without hailing. By the time Sumire calls it in, the shuttle has already latched to the cargo bay, deposited three sealed crates, and detached. No pilot visible through the canopy. No markings. No comm traffic. Yang pries the first crate open in the mech bay, crowbar in hand. He pulls back the foam lining and stops. "Well. At least they're paying in hardware." Inside, packed in impact-resistant cradles, is a set of components stamped with no manufacturer logos. The machining is tight. The alloy work is unfamiliar. Yang turns a stabilizer housing over in his hands, testing the weight. "Custom fabrication. Nothing off a standard production line. Whoever built this wasn't cutting corners." He sets it down carefully and moves to the second crate. "More of the same. Actuator assemblies, targeting linkages, heat management modules. All unmarked, all field-ready." Before he can open the third, Darius comes through the bay door at a half-jog, datapad in hand. "Commander. We just picked up a transmission. Tight-beam, Watch encryption. It's from Arelle." He holds up the datapad. The message is short, the language is not. "I won't read the whole thing out loud. Let's just say she found some creative uses for words I didn't think she knew. The short version is she knows we've turned, and she's promising to personally drag us back in pieces." Yang glances up from the crate. "That was fast." Darius nods, still scanning the message. "Faster than it should have been. Either someone told her or she is tracking the Argo's energy fluctuations from preparing for travel. Either way, she's not guessing. She knows." The bay falls quiet for a moment. Yang looks at the open crates, then back at Darius. "Well. New boss sends gifts, old boss sends death threats. At least we know where we stand."

Description.Name: Agree with Yang and have him catalogue the contents of the crates.
Agree with Yang and have him catalogue the contents of the crates.
Description.Details: [A new flashpoint has been created in the Ryerson system for the continuation of the campaign]
